prediction.reasoning: For a 1-day prediction of ZTS stock, I used historical volatility assumptions typical for large-cap pharmaceutical stocks. With an estimated daily volatility of ~1.6%, the point estimate remains at the current price assuming no directional bias. Confidence intervals are calculated using normal distribution assumptions with progressively wider ranges to capture increasing uncertainty levels at 50%, 80%, and 90% confidence.
